title: Duplicate an item in one group and move to multiple other groups?
excerpt: Hello! I work on a board with dozens of groups that have similar templated items. When building the board, I build a template group and duplicate that group for all of the pieces i’m tracking within that group. Often, on…

posts.author: j0sh (Josh Kluchka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I work on a board with dozens of groups that have similar templated items. When building the board, I build a template group and duplicate that group for all of the pieces i’m tracking within that group. Often, once my board is complete and groups are finalized, an item needs to be added to all groups. Currently, when i duplicate an item from one group, i cannot move that item to multiple groups, I have to duplicate once and move individually, dozens of times. I would love a feature where when i select “move to group” I can select multiple groups for that duplicate to move to, within the board. Apologies if this already exists, I’d love to know how to unlock that feature if it does.
Thank you!!
